# omc LEARNINGS — Auto-generated by sessionEnd hook

This file is automatically updated by the sessionEnd hook.
Each entry records what changed in agents/ at the end of a session.
Atlas uses this context at sessionStart to inform delegation decisions.

## Format
[timestamp] Auto-committed: <changed files>
[timestamp] MANUAL: <manually added learning>
